comment: Pinned release record for the vdocs data-v1 release. Atlas fetch-verifies these published artifacts and never re-derives them (proposal §3.1). Unlike vista-meta, the db is not a standalone asset: index.db + the gold tree ship inside vdocs-data-v1.tar.gz; the producer manifest (itself sha-pinned here) carries the per-file sha256s used to verify the extracted contents. Shas copied from the data-v1 release's SHA256SUMS; update only by re-pinning against a new published release.
